---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused technical improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What workflow is difficult or currently impossible?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the tool/API or documentation change, including inputs and outputs.

## Alternatives

What workaround exists today, and why is it insufficient?

## Validation

How could this be tested without requiring user IDBs or binary fixtures?
